productDisplayName: Nike Men Zoom Kobe Venomenon Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note A lightweight foot style option for cross-country walking, running or training, the nike Zoom Kobe Venomenon II combines performance with enhanced style. This pair is a shoe closet essential that is designed to pamper your feet (and doubles as a casual shoe!). Product Details Round toed synthetic upper with mesh inlays and central lace ups Nike swoosh at the midfoot Rubber midsole Thick TPU outsole with patterned grooves Material and Care Synthetic, mesh Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
